mapper.select:
SELECT s.store_id, s.region_id, r.region_name, s.category_id, c.code AS category, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, s.store_name, s.address, s.phone, s.business_hours, s.emoji, s.rating_avg, s.status, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.created_at, s.updated_at, a.login_id AS admin_login_id FROM tb_store s LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_admin a ON a.store_id = s.store_id AND a.role = 'STORE_OWNER' AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_store s WHERE 1=1

SELECT s.store_id, s.region_id, r.region_name, s.category_id, c.code AS category, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, s.store_name, s.address, s.phone, s.business_hours, s.description, s.emoji, s.rating_avg, s.status, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.created_at, s.updated_at, a.login_id AS admin_login_id FROM tb_store s LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_admin a ON a.store_id = s.store_id AND a.role = 'STORE_OWNER' AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} AND s.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_store (region_id, category_id, category, store_name, address, phone, business_hours, description, emoji, latitude, longitude, store_image, store_image_type, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{regionId}, #{categoryId}, #{category}, #{storeName}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{businessHours}, #{description}, #{emoji}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{storeImage, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{storeImageType}, #{status}, #{adminLoginId}, #{adminLoginId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_store SET store_name = #{storeName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category = #{category}, region_id = #{regionId}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, business_hours = #{businessHours}, description = #{description}, emoji = #{emoji}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, status = #{status},
store_image = #{storeImage, jdbcType=BLOB}, store_image_type = #{storeImageType},
updated_by = #{adminLoginId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_store SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT store_image, store_image_type FROM tb_store WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT region_id, region_name FROM tb_region WHERE is_active = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY region_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_admin (login_id, password, name, role, store_id, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, 'STORE_OWNER', #{storeId}, 'ACTIVE', 'system', 'system')
